expertise.rationale: Maps to 'Obsidian Pendulum' — dark, grounded, stable.
Maps to 'Prism Weaver' — high-energy, multi-spectrum, digital refinement.
Maps to 'Luminous Compass' — navigational, bright, guiding.
Maps to 'Chronicles' — sepia tones, archival, parchment-like stability.

roles.description: Hexagonal structural base for agents building or designing frameworks.
Layered vertical geometries for agents maintaining logs and records.
A sharp, narrow vertical anchor for agents validating data and timestamps.
Symmetrical, multi-pointed shape for agents facilitating quorum and coordination.

idle.definition: low-amplitude opacity and bloom oscillation, 6–8s loop.

input_processing.definition: radial scale-in from 105%↑100% with slight desaturation.

output_generation.definition: radial scale-out from 95%↑100% with slight saturation boost.

verification.definition: °12–18° vertical arc around top anchor, 4–6s loop.

refinement.definition: hue rotation across the expertise spectrum, 10–14s loop.

coordination.definition: 3–5 small nodes orbiting the core geometry, 8–10s loop.

streaming.definition: thin band at base/edge with left-to-right scroll.
